sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Users, Trophy, Clock, Play, Search, Filter, Gift, Zap } from 'lucide-react'; interface Tournament { id: number; name: string; description: string; participants: number; maxParticipants: number; startDate: Date; endDate: Date; prize: string; points: number; difficulty: 'Beginner' | 'Intermediate' | 'Advanced' | 'Expert'; status: 'upcoming' | 'active' | 'completed'; } interface LeaderboardEntry { id: number; rank: number; name: string; score: number; scenariosCompleted: number; points: number; countryCode: string; } const Multiplayer: React.FC = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'tournaments' | 'leaderboard' | 'friends' | 'rules'>('tournaments'); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const tournaments: Tournament[] = [ { id: 1, name: "Criminal Law Championship", description: "Compete in complex criminal law scenarios with real-world cases", participants: 42, maxParticipants: 100, startDate: new Date(2025, 10, 15), endDate: new Date(2025, 10, 22), prize: "₹25,000 + Certificate", points: 5000, difficulty: "Advanced", status: "active" }, { id: 2, name: "Contract Drafting Tournament", description: "Showcase your contract drafting skills in timed challenges", participants: 78, maxParticipants: 150, startDate: new Date(2025, 10, 20), endDate: new Date(2025, 10, 27), prize: "₹15,000 + Certificate", points: 3000, difficulty: "Intermediate", status: "upcoming" }, { id: 3, name: "Family Law Masters", description: "Navigate complex family law scenarios with sensitivity and expertise", participants: 25, maxParticipants: 50, startDate: new Date(2025, 9, 1), endDate: new Date(2025, 9, 8), prize: "₹30,000 + Certificate", points: 7000, difficulty: "Expert", status: "completed" } ]; const leaderboard: LeaderboardEntry[] = [ { id: 1, rank: 1, name: "Aditi Sharma", score: 98, scenariosCompleted: 142, points: 12500, countryCode: "IN" }, { id: 2, rank: 2, name: "Raj Patel", score: 96, scenariosCompleted: 138, points: 10000, countryCode: "IN" }, { id: 3, rank: 3, name: "Priya Kumar", score: 94, scenariosCompleted: 135, points: 8500, countryCode: "IN" }, { id: 4, rank: 4, name: "Michael Chen", score: 92, scenariosCompleted: 129, points: 7000, countryCode: "SG" }, { id: 5, rank: 5, name: "Sarah Johnson", score: 90, scenariosCompleted: 127, points: 6000, countryCode: "US" }, { id: 6, rank: 6, name: "James Wilson", score: 88, scenariosCompleted: 124, points: 5000, countryCode: "GB" }, { id: 7, rank: 7, name: "You", score: 85, scenariosCompleted: 118, points: 4500, countryCode: "IN" }, { id: 8, rank: 8, name: "Nikhil Reddy", score: 84, scenariosCompleted: 115, points: 4000, countryCode: "IN" }, { id: 9, rank: 9, name: "Emma Thompson", score: 82, scenariosCompleted: 112, points: 3500, countryCode: "AU" }, { id: 10, rank: 10, name: "David Kim", score: 80, scenariosCompleted: 109, points: 3000, countryCode: "KR" } ]; const friends = [ { id: 1, name: "Amit Verma", status: "online", lastActive: "Active now", score: 82, points: 4200 }, { id: 2, name: "Sneha Gupta", status: "online", lastActive: "Active now", score: 78, points: 3800 }, { id: 3, name: "Rohan Mehta", status: "away", lastActive: "2 hours ago", score: 85, points: 5100 }, { id: 4, name: "Pooja Singh", status: "offline", lastActive: "5 hours ago", score: 76, points: 3500 }, { id: 5, name: "Karan Desai", status: "online", lastActive: "Active now", score: 88, points: 6200 } ]; const getStatusColor = (status: string) => { switch (status) { case 'active': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'; case 'upcoming': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'; case 'completed': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; } }; const getDifficultyColor = (difficulty: string) => { switch (difficulty) { case 'Beginner': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'; case 'Intermediate': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'; case 'Advanced': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'; case 'Expert': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; } }; const getStatusIcon = (status: string) => { switch (status) { case 'online': return
; case 'away': return
; case 'offline': return
; default: return
; } }; const filteredTournaments = tournaments.filter(tournament => tournament.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || tournament.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); return (

Multiplayer Mode

Compete with peers and climb the leaderboards to earn bonus points

{/* Tabs */}
{/* Tournaments Tab */} {activeTab === 'tournaments' && (

Active Tournaments

setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} />
{filteredTournaments.map(tournament => (

{tournament.name}

{tournament.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + tournament.status.slice(1)} {tournament.difficulty}
{tournament.points} pts

{tournament.description}

Participants
{tournament.participants}/{tournament.maxParticipants}
Duration
{Math.ceil((tournament.endDate.getTime() - tournament.startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))} days
Starts: {tournament.startDate.toLocaleDateString()}
))}
)} {/* Leaderboard Tab */} {activeTab === 'leaderboard' && (

Global Leaderboard

Rank
Player
Scenarios
Score
Points
{leaderboard.map(player => (
{player.rank}
{player.name.charAt(0)}
{player.name}
{player.countryCode}
{player.scenariosCompleted}
{player.score}
{player.points.toLocaleString()}
))}

Earn Bonus Points in Tournaments

Participate in multiplayer tournaments and climb the leaderboard to earn bonus points that can be used to unlock premium scenarios in the marketplace.

1st Place
5,000 points
2nd Place
3,000 points
3rd Place
2,000 points
)} {/* Friends Tab */} {activeTab === 'friends' && (

Friends

{friends.map(friend => (
{friend.name.charAt(0)}

{friend.name}

{getStatusIcon(friend.status)} {friend.lastActive}
Score
{friend.score}
Points
{friend.points.toLocaleString()}
))}
)} {/* Rules & Points Tab */} {activeTab === 'rules' && (

Rules & Points System

{/* Points System Guide */}

How Points Work

Earn bonus points through multiplayer tournaments and use them to unlock premium scenarios in the marketplace.

1

Earn Points in Tournaments

Participate in multiplayer tournaments to earn bonus points based on your ranking. Higher rankings earn more points.

2

Use Points in Marketplace

Spend your earned points to unlock premium scenarios in the marketplace. Each scenario has a point cost displayed.

3

Subscription Bonuses

Subscribers receive bonus points with their plan and discounts on scenario purchases.

Tournament Rules

Participation Requirements

  • Must have completed at least 5 scenarios in the platform
  • Participants must join before the tournament start time
  • Only one account per person is allowed

Competition Format

  • Each tournament consists of 3-5 legal scenarios
  • Participants have a fixed time limit for each scenario
  • Scoring is based on accuracy, speed, and argument quality
  • Final ranking is determined by cumulative score

Fair Play Policy

  • No external assistance or collaboration during tournaments
  • Use of automated tools or scripts is prohibited
  • Violations may result in disqualification and account suspension
{/* Points Rewards */}

Tournament Rewards

1st Place 5,000 points
2nd Place 3,000 points
3rd Place 2,000 points
4th-10th Place 1,000 points
Top 25% 500 points

Points Value

100 points = ₹10 value
500 points = ₹50 value
1,000 points = ₹100 value

Points can be used for scenario purchases and subscription discounts

)}
); }; export default Multiplayer;
